bodyText: You're back online We use cookies to measure performance and improve your experience. Privacy policy Manage cookies Skip to main content · AHPRA-registered doctors Your prescription, without the waiting room. Complete a secure clinical form. We only interrupt you if something important is missing. Tell us what you already take. Once approved, your eScript is sent to your phone for any Australian pharmacy. Full refund if our doctor can't help. Renew medication · $29.95 New prescription Takes about 3 minutes. Full refund if our doctor can't help. Last reviewed 13 min ago Google Telehealth Certified InstantMed 2:34 PM eScript Ready Active Your electronic prescription is ready. Show this at any pharmacy to collect your medication. PRESCRIPTION TOKEN ABCD-1234-EFGH Regular medication Qty: 30 · Repeats: 5 Show to any pharmacist to collect Sent via SMS Any pharmacy Accepting requests Prescriptions: Submit 24/7 No video appointment 2-minute form Privacy Act protected 256-bit encrypted Pricing Two paths, both flat-fee. No hidden costs. Full refund if we can't help. Most common Repeat prescription Renewing a medication you already take $29.95one-time Medication you've been prescribed before eScript via SMS to any Australian pharmacy PBS pricing applies at the counter Renew medication New prescription Starting a medication for the first time $49.95one-time Doctor assessment included eScript sent to your phone Full refund if we can’t help New prescription Need repeat scripts every month? Use the repeat prescription pathway when you need a doctor review for medication you already take. Each request is reviewed separately and charged once. Not sure which you need? Repeat = medication you already take. New = something you haven't been prescribed. PHARMACY PRICING PBS subsidies apply at the pharmacy. You only pay the standard PBS co-payment for eligible medications. Same subsidy you would get with any eligible GP-issued eScript. The pharmacy still dispenses and prices the medicine. POPULAR SEARCHES Repeat prescription routes Service-level information for repeat requests, after-hours timing, weekend access, and urgent-but-not-emergency prescription review. Repeat prescription online Existing regular medicine details, reviewed before any eScript. After-hours repeat prescription Submit after hours, with review timing and safety boundaries. Weekend repeat prescription Weekend repeat request pathway for existing regular medicines. Urgent repeat prescription Time-sensitive repeat review without treating emergencies as admin. Three steps. No waiting room. From your couch to your pharmacy. Scripts are sent digitally if approved. 1 Enter your medication Tell us what you need renewed. Takes about five minutes. ~5 minutes 2 A real doctor reviews it An AHPRA-registered doctor checks your request and medical history. ~44 min 3 eScript sent to your phone Once approved, your electronic prescription is sent by SMS. Take it to any pharmacy. Instant Renew your medication Digital prescriptions What is an eScript? eScripts are digital prescriptions. The national standard in Australia since 2020. No paper needed, works everywhere. InstantMed 2:34 PM eScript Ready Your electronic prescription is ready. Show this token at any pharmacy in Australia. PRESCRIPTION TOKEN Active ABCD-1234-EFGH Regular medication Qty: 30 · Repeats: 5 Show to any pharmacist to collect Accepted at every pharmacy in Australia No paper scripts or printing needed PBS subsidies apply at the pharmacy Includes repeats where appropriate National standard since 2020 eScripts were introduced by the Australian Government in 2020 as the national standard for electronic prescriptions. They work with the same medications and PBS subsidies as paper scripts. Review scope Common areas we can review For medicines you already take. Details are collected securely inside the request form. Blood pressure Stable repeat requests already prescribed by your usual doctor Cholesterol Regular cholesterol medicines that do not need urgent review Contraceptives Ongoing contraception reviews where online care is suitable Asthma & COPD Maintenance inhaler reviews for stable, non-urgent symptoms Reflux & gut Repeat requests for stable reflux or gut symptom management Skin conditions Ongoing skin-care prescriptions already used safely Thyroid Stable thyroid medicine reviews with recent monitoring where needed Other regular meds Other stable repeat medicines assessed case by case Time saved Your medication. Without the appointment. INSTANTMED ~45min GP VISIT 3+hrs 5 min form Doctor reviews your request eScript sent to your phone Call for appointment Travel to clinic Wait room + consult + pharmacy AHPRA Verified AHPRA-registered doctors Every request is reviewed and approved by an experienced, AHPRA-registered Australian doctor. No automated clinical decisions. Verify any doctor's registration on the AHPRA public register Not available for every medication × Controlled medicines that require in-person car
